emotional_tone: Serious, high-stakes, polished, operator command centre

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Dense and compact spacing, 'Control Room' grid.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Mode B: 'Control Room' Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. border-collapse style layout. Minimal rounded corners (max rounded-sm or rounded-none).

components.buttons: Square or 2px radius. Stark contrast. Primary: White bg, black text. Secondary: Transparent bg, 1px border. Hover states must invert or lighten.
components.tables: Dense. 1px border-b on rows. Monospace fonts for numbers/dates. Status badges must be minimal squares.
components.cards: Cardless or 1px border. No shadows. Flat surface.
components.progress_bars: Sharp edges, flat colors. No gradients. Unpaid milestones block progress visually (e.g., striped or greyed out).
components.modals: Backdrop blur. Dark panel with stark 1px border.
components.inputs: Flat, 1px border, stark focus ring (electric blue).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and instant. Background lightness increases. Text color brightens.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Fast and purposeful. 150ms ease-out for color changes.

media_and_assets.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - Duotone or regular weight for dense data.

images.description: Completely black background with subtle texture
images.usage: Use as full-screen background for the admin login screen.

images.description: Moody black and white portrait of a man in a suit
images.usage: Use in the header/navigation bar for the logged-in admin user.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Dark Swiss Brutalist aesthetic. Avoid gradients, drop shadows, and pill-shaped buttons.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Use JetBrains Mono for all numeric values, dates, and currency to enforce a command-center feel.
Apply 'Grid Borders' strategy: Use 1px #27272A borders aggressively to separate sections and data points, creating a rigid dashboard skeleton.
Use the exact colors provided in the palette. Do not invent new shades of blue/teal.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover and focus states defined.
Status badges should use the accent colors: Signal Red for Delayed/Overdue, Warning Yellow for In Progress, Success Green for Completed.
Implement the UI using pure HTML/Tailwind for complex grids, and heavily customize Shadcn components (strip out rounding and shadows).
Incorporate data-testid attributes universally for testing.
